title: BuildCraft
description: BuildCraft is a modpack that makes building in Minecraft easier and faster with useful tools, features, and quality-of-life improvements.
body:
## 🚧 **Archived:** No further updates planned for this modpack.

**BuildCraft is a modpack that makes building in Minecraft 100 times easier!**  

**With mods like [Axiom!](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom)**
![Axiom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a866323da31a3ee24dee4fb8c1e6325101f3c68.png)
**Axiom adds many building features, like pasting in saved buildings, creating mountains, and much more!**

## And other mods that are in the pack:

- [**WorldEdit**](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit)  
makes it very easy to change, for example, dirt into 50% stone, 30% diamond blocks, and 20% lava!
- [**Litematica**](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)  
makes it possible to paste in any schematic you have with ease, and move it however you like!
- [**VisibleBarriers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/visiblebarriers)  
makes it possible to see normally invisible blocks, like barriers and light blocks!
- [**Armor Poser**](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-poser) & [**Armor Statues**](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-statues)  
makes it very easy to change many aspects of armor stands!
- [**True Sight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/true-sight) (Single-player only)  
makes invisible entities visible! Client-side!
- [**Head Browser**](https://modrinth.com/mod/headbrowser)  
adds a menu where you can browse and pick many player heads!

> ### [Check out my resource packs!](<https://modrinth.com/user/EpicA1M>)
> [**All My Packs**](<https://modrinth.com/collection/1P9Fp1vd>)  
> [**Visual Enchantments**](<https://modrinth.com/collection/AA68Bowh>)  
> [**Transparent Items**](<https://modrinth.com/collection/xNFgZ94H>)
> 
> ### And my [Discord Server](<https://discord.gg/xm3nSUwUka>)!
